variants.title: AS1468
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec AS1468. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the AS1468 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Outer Diameter: 169.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 115.0 mm, Length: 358.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C
